description:
Kling V3.0 - latest video generation with native 4K.

Modes determined by inputs:
- Text-to-video: prompt only
- Image-to-video: prompt + image (first frame)
- Start/end frame: prompt + image + end_image

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video content. Max 2500 chars.
examples: A cinematic drone shot sweeping over a coastal city at golden hour, waves crashing against the harbor
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: Start frame image for image-to-video. Formats: jpg, jpeg, png. Max 10MB, min 300px.
image.title: Image

end_image.description: End frame image. Requires image to be set as start frame.
end_image.title: End Image

mode.description: Generation mode. 'pro' for higher quality, 'std' for faster/cheaper.

sound.description: Generate synchronized audio with the video.
sound.title: Sound

duration.description: Video duration in seconds (3-15). Billed per second.
duration.title: Duration

negative_prompt.description: What to avoid in the video. Max 2500 chars.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

title: AppInput
